problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
